title: LEGO City Advent Calendar 2025 for 5+ Year Old Boys & Girls - Christmas Countdown Toy with 24 Surprises incl. a Train, Car & Tractor plus 7 Minifigures - Gift Idea - 60475
features: FUN-PACKED TOY ADVENT CALENDAR – Add a sprinkle of excitement to the festive season with the LEGO City Advent Calendar 2025 toy for 5+ year old boys and girls
WITH 24 SURPRISES – Includes Santa and Mrs. Claus LEGO minifigures, characters with polar bear, reindeer and Christmas tree costumes, mini builds and fun accessories

FESTIVE PLAYMAT – Kids fold out the box to reveal a Christmas party scene, where they can play out stories and with the mini builds which include a car toy, train, tractor, spaceship, robot and a truck
DESIGNED FOR LITTLE BUILDERS – Each mini build in the LEGO City Advent Calendar 2025 comes with an easy-to-follow building guide printed on the inside of its calendar window
FESTIVE GIFT FOR KIDS – This toy-filled Advent calendar makes a fun early Christmas gift for 5+ year old boys and girls who are fans of LEGO building sets
PLAY AND LEARN TOYS – Exciting stories unfold as kids discover festive characters, seasonal mini builds and accessories behind every door
CREATIVE PLAY WITHOUT LIMITS – Kids unleash more fun and adventures when they add this set to others (sold separately) from the LEGO City range
description: From the manufacturer The LEGO City Advent Calendar 2025 has landed! Open the door to the festive season with the LEGO City Advent Calendar 2025 – packed with 24 gifts for kids aged 5 and over. A surprise behind every door! Magical stories unfold as kids discover festive characters, seasonal mini builds and fun accessories. LEGO City Advent Calendar 2025 Holiday-themed attire Includes characters in polar bear, reindeer and Christmas tree costumes. Foldout playmat A Christmas party scene is the perfect backdrop for imaginative play. Commence countdown! Kickstart the festive season with a festive gift for ages 5 and over. Easy building guide An easy-to-follow construction guide printed inside each calendar door ensures a fun and easy building experience. A creative gift for kids Surprise your young builder with this fun LEGO City Advent Calendar 2025 playset for kids who love imaginative play.

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Warning! Choking hazard. Small parts. Not suitable for children under 3 years old.
